commits.commitMessage: fix(core): Use schema-qualified table paths in EXISTS subqueries (#4501)
fix(core): Make OrderService.mergeOrders atomic and concurrency-safe (#4488)
fix(core): Remove stale shipping lines when shipping method no longer exists (#4487)
fix(core): Use channel language fallbacks in FacetService and FacetValueService (#4434)
fix(core): Handle empty sortedAssets in updateEntityAssets (#4397)
fix(core): Persist customFields in updateGlobalSettings mutation (#4343)
fix(core): Include channelId in productInStock cache key (#4214)
fix(core): Run promotion side effects before OrderLine save (#4350)
fix(core): Use channel-aware cache keys for active tax zone (#4329)
fix(core): Emit post-update entity in VendureEntityEvent for updated events (#4352)
fix(core): Fix coupon code removal not clearing adjustments
fix(core): Exclude seller orders when counting promotion usage (#4070)
fix(core): Persist custom fields when creating new ProductVariantPrice (#4184)
fix(core): Correctly publish ChangeChannelEvent with new channel IDs. (#4176)
fix(core): Fix SubscribableJob.updates() completing after single emission (#4120)
fix(core): Use previously unused relations filter in findByCustomerId (#4118)
fix(core): Fix scheduled task concurrent execution on Postgres (#4069)
fix(core): Correct behaviour of complex list filtering (#4068)
fix(core): Update validation for session when using relationLoadStrategy query (#3691)
